        "FINDING: X-Frame-Options header is present to prevent clickjacking"

        strict=False,
        reason=(

        ),
    )
    def test_x_frame_options_header_present_to_prevent_clickjacking(
        self, session, api_base_url: str
    ):
        with allure.step("GET login page and inspect X-Frame-Options response header"):

            )
            resp = session.get(_url(api_base_url, _LOGIN_ROUTE))
    
        with allure.step("Assert X-Frame-Options is set to DENY or SAMEORIGIN"):
            LOGGER.info(
                "Step: Assert X-Frame-Options present; got: %r",
                resp.headers.get("X-Frame-Options", "NOT PRESENT"),
            )
            xfo = resp.headers.get("X-Frame-Options", "")

                f"Expected {len(products)} items added, got {len(added)}"
            )
    
        with allure.step("Open cart and verify item count"):

    @allure.title(
        "FINDING: Open redirect via redirect parameter in currency endpoint is blocked"
    )
    @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.CRITICAL)
    @pytest.mark.xfail(

            "unvalidated open redirect allows phishing and credential-harvesting attacks"
        ),
    )
    def test_open_redirect_via_currency_redirect_parameter_is_blocked(
        self, session, api_base_url: str
    ):
        external_url = "https://evil.example.com/phishing"
    
        with allure.step(
            f"POST currency/currency with external redirect={external_url!r}"
        ):
            LOGGER.info(
                "Step: POST common/currency/currency with redirect=%s", external_url
            )
            resp = session.post(
                f"{api_base_url}/index.php",
                params={"route": _CURRENCY_ROUTE},
                data={"code": "USD", "redirect": external_url},
                allow_redirects=False,
            )
    
        with allure.step(
            "Assert Location header stays within the site domain (no external redirect)"
        ):
            LOGGER.info(
                "Step: Assert Location does not point to evil.example.com; got: %s",
                resp.headers.get("Location", ""),
            )
            location = resp.headers.get("Location", "")

    @allure.title("iPhone product detail page shows heading and add-to-cart button")
    @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.CRITICAL)
    def test_iphone_product_detail_has_essentials(
        self,
        home_page: HomePage,
        search_results_page: SearchResultsPage,
        product_detail_page: ProductDetailPage,
    ):
        with allure.step("Search for iPhone from the home page"):
            home_page.open()
            home_page.search("iPhone")
    
        with allure.step("Open the iPhone product from search results"):
            search_results_page.open_product("iPhone")
    
        with allure.step("Verify product detail essentials are present"):
            assert product_detail_page.has_product_heading("iPhone"), (
                "iPhone product heading not visible"
            )
>           assert product_detail_page.has_add_to_cart_button(), (
                "Add to Cart button not visible on iPhone detail page"
            )
